versions.version_description: Reworked tab, this is meant to be as a easy way to play a cover on a single acoustic guitar...

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Hey there this is my first Song i hope you like it!
I took Eagels Chords an fixed them ( or so i think ), so all credit to him.

cheers Burobernd

Here it is:
-------------------------------------------------------------------

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x2 Stummed

Verse 1

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
I took a walk around the world to ease my troubled mind [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
I left my body laying somewhere in the sands of time [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I watched the world float to the dark side of the moon [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I feel there is nothing I can do,           yeah [/tab]

Verse 2

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I watched the world float to the dark side of the moon [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
After all I knew it had to be something to do with you [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
I really don't mind what happens now and then [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
As long as you'll be my friend at the end [/tab]

Refrain

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still call me Superman [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be there holding my hand [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with my superhuman might Kryptonite [/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] x 2

Verse 3

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
You called me strong, you called me weak but your secrets I will keep [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]       
You took for granted all the times I never let you down [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
You stumbled in and bumped your head, if not for me then you would be dead [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
I picked you up and put you back on solid ground [/tab]

Refrain

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still call me Superman [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be there holding my hand [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with my superhuman might Kryptonite[/tab]

Interlude 

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] x 4

Refrain

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still call me Superman [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be there holding my hand [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with my superhuman might Kryptonite   Yeah[/tab]

Refrain

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
If I go crazy then will you still call me Superman [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
If I'm alive and well, will you be there holding my hand [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I'll keep you by my side with my superhuman might Kryptonite[/tab]

Outro
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch] 
         Oh whoa whoa [/tab]
3x 

End
